title: Bee Removal in Carle Place, NY | $350 – $550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional bee removal services in Carle Place, Long Island. Safe, humane bee hive extraction starting at $350. Licensed experts serving residential and commercial properties. Call today!
intro: Best Pest Control NYC provides expert bee removal services throughout Carle Place, ensuring the safe and humane extraction of bee colonies from your property. Our licensed technicians understand the unique challenges faced by Carle Place homeowners and businesses, from historic residential areas to commercial districts along Old Country Road. With competitive pricing between $350 and $550, we deliver fast, effective solutions to protect your family and preserve valuable pollinator populations.
whyUs: Our team combines years of experience with eco-friendly bee removal techniques specifically tailored to Long Island properties. We offer same-day emergency service to Carle Place residents, transparent pricing with no hidden fees, and a commitment to relocating bees whenever possible rather than extermination.
localContext: Carle Place's mix of well-established single-family homes near the Village of Mineola border and commercial properties along Glen Cove Road creates ideal nesting conditions for honeybees and carpenter bees, especially during spring and summer months. The mature trees throughout neighborhoods like those surrounding Carle Place Middle School and the proximity to retail centers make regular property inspections essential for early bee colony detection.

faqs.question: How much does bee removal cost in Carle Place?
faqs.answer: Bee removal services in Carle Place typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the hive location, colony size, and accessibility. Ground-level hives are generally less expensive, while removals from second-story eaves, attics, or wall voids may be priced at the higher end. We provide free estimates and upfront pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a bee hive in Carle Place?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and emergency bee removal services throughout Carle Place and surrounding Long Island communities. Most bee removals are completed within 2-4 hours, depending on the complexity of the infestation. We understand that active bee colonies near entryways or outdoor living spaces require immediate attention, especially during warmer months.

faqs.question: Do you exterminate bees or relocate them?
faqs.answer: Whenever possible, we prioritize humane bee relocation over extermination to support pollinator conservation. Our technicians safely remove the entire colony, including the queen and hive, and work with local beekeepers to rehome honeybees. In cases where aggressive Africanized bees or structural safety concerns exist, we may recommend extermination followed by complete hive removal and exclusion services.

faqs.question: What types of bees do you remove in Carle Place?
faqs.answer: We remove all bee species common to Long Island, including honeybees, carpenter bees, bumblebees, and ground bees. Carle Place properties frequently experience carpenter bee damage to wooden siding, decks, and trim, as well as honeybee colonies in attics, chimneys, and tree cavities. Our technicians identify the species and customize removal methods accordingly to ensure complete elimination and prevent future infestations.
